svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="yocto-layer" name="Yocto meta-sentinel Layer Structure"> <mxGraphModel dx="-375" dy="-96" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="700" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Yocto meta-sentinel Layer Structure" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="10" width="500" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="root" value="meta-sentinel/" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333;fontColor=#fff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="50" width="640" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conf" value="conf/" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="100" width="180" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conf_layer" value="layer.conf" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="135" width="180" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core" value="recipes-core/" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="180" width="300" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_gw" value="sentinel-gw/" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="215" width="260" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_bb" value="sentinel-gw_1.0.0.bb" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=15;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="237" width="260" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_service" value="files/sentinel-gw.service (systemd unit)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=15;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="257" width="260" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn" value="recipes-connectivity/" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="100" width="310" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn_usb" value="usb-gadget/" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="135" width="270" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn_bb" value="usb-cdc-ecm.bb (CDC-ECM config)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=15;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="157" width="270" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kernel" value="recipes-kernel/" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="200" width="310" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kernel_linux" value="linux/" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="235" width="270" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kernel_bb" value="linux-yocto_%.bbappend (USB gadget + CDC-ECM kernel cfg)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=15;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="257" width="270" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note1" value="Gateway application recipe
+ systemd auto-start" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#82b366;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="280" width="200" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note2" value="USB CDC-ECM network config
(static IP 192.168.7.1)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="280" width="250" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
